arts.ttl: Arsenal will be sitting ducks if Mikel Arteta's only plan at Man City is to survive, writes DANNY MURPHY - and one name on the team sheet will tell you if he's going to sit back
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: Arsenal definitely have the tools to fight for the Premier League again and Sunday afternoon's clash looks highly significant - even in September.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer target Joan Garcia addresses failed Premier League move
arts.sum: Espanyol goalkeeper Joan Garcia opens up on his experience of the recent summer transfer window after being the subject of bids from Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: People want to see Man City wiped from face of the Earth
arts.sum: City are facing the threat of a points deduction or even expulsion from the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Brighton star Jack Hinshelwood makes Bukayo Saka admission as England dream outlined
arts.sum: Brighton's Jack Hinshelwood has enjoyed an eye-catching start to the 2024-25 season after winning Albion's Young Player of the Year award last term and now the highly-rated 19-year-old has set his sights on a future England call-up

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Bukayo Saka using title and Euros pain to inspire another Premier League tilt
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka has seen Arsenal come up short twice in title races with Manchester City, coupled with double Euros pain for England having lost the last two finals

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola explains Man City style ahead of Arsenal clash - 'Only if we are s**t'
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola insists neither he or opposite number Mikel Arteta will be playing for a draw when Arsenal travel to the Etihad on Sunday

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola says rest of football want Man City to 'disappear' in 115 charges case
arts.sum: Manchester City's court case into the 115 charges levelled against them by the Premier League is underway, and boss Pep Guardiola is under no illusions as to its significance

arts.ttl: Bukayo Saka adamant Arsenal are going to Manchester City to win
arts.sum: The north Londoners received criticism in some quarters for their defensive approach in last season’s 0-0 draw at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Erling Haaland plan, creativity issues and Man City vs Arsenal
arts.sum: We need to do it much more consistently if you want the game to flow. We need to be a lot more consistent if we want the team to flow.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: ‘Everyone wants City to disappear’ in legal battle
arts.sum: Club insist they have ‘irrefutable evidence’ of innocence Manager wary of Arsenal’s threat Pep Guardiola believes “everyone wants Manchester City to disappear off the earth” as the champions battle against the 115 Premier League charges. City deny all counts and the hearing before an independent commission began last Monday in London. City host Arsenal in Sunday’s Premier League showdown but rather than answer if Guardiola had ever set up a team for a goalless draw, he instead referred to the legal case. The club deny wrongdoing and insist they have a “comprehensive body of irrefutable evidence” to support their stance. Continue reading...
